name: Yoko-Zuna Sumo Spirit
name_jp: スモウ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピリット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＹＯＫＯ－ＺＵＮＡ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヨコヅナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If a monster(s) is Pendulum Summoned: Return this card from the Pendulum Zone to the hand.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can send to the GY all monsters your opponent controls in the same column as the card(s) in your Pendulum Zones. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.
pend_eff: If a monster(s) is Pendulum Summoned: Return this card from the Pendulum Zone to the hand.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can send to the GY all monsters your opponent controls in the same column as the card(s) in your Pendulum Zones. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can send to the GY all monsters your opponent controls in the same column as the card(s) in your Pendulum Zones. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
